name: Scentre Group
analysis: SCG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.8900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.9200, stop A$3.6828, target A$4.6316 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
